title: After the Yomiuri Milers C.: Inspiring Courage

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew! All right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Good. My body's moving more and more in sync
with my thoughts!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'm able to put more strength in my strides too.
Each step is much more powerful than before!
Now, if I can just get into this new flow...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I'm sure I can run even better!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Nishino Flower returns, she looks like she's
figured something out.
choice_data_list: You don't look tired at all.
You don't look tired at all.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm not! This must be more proof of my growth!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not enough. This is nowhere near good enough...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yamanin Zephyr has seemed down ever since the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
choice_data_list: If you're worried, you should go talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Should I? I don't want to be a bother.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What if I say the wrong thing?
choice_data_list: You can't go wrong with kindness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's true... Sometimes, you just need someone
to ask.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Then can you wait for a moment? I'll be
right back!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr? Um...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...The wind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I can't reach the wind that will carry me to the one
I admire.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, is there someone you look up to, Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Yes. Is that surprising?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well... A little.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
To me, it looks like you're competing more with
yourself than anyone else...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
That is true... but it all started with a single,
magnificent gale.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
The awe it inspired in me lifted me up... and it's
what has brought me this far.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: But that gale did not offer me unbound freedom.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I am faced with a limit—the insurmountable wall
of 2,000 meters.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
There is only one thing for me to do—swallow up
even the gale that inspired me as I continue to
take on this wall.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I have resolved myself to run to the endless
beyond, until no obstacles stand before me.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...But competing with yourself isn't easy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Zephyr...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(She's working hard because of the person she
looks up to. The person she cares about. Just like
me.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I remember when I tried to stay positive even
when I was having trouble running, but I still felt a
wall in front of me. Back then, I...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Zephyr? Is it that you want to do your best for
that person, but you're afraid of failing?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Fear of failure... Yes, perhaps that is the feeling that haunts me.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
If I cannot make my running in the Yasuda Kinen
match my ideal, then...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, Flower. Your kindness has given me
much comfort.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I didn't do anything. All I did was listen.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You've done more than that. Your running has
inspired me.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Now then, I'll see you at our next race.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Zephyr seemed really troubled.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wonder if there's anything I can do...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But how?
choice_data_list:
Well, you're also trying to get over a wall right
now, aren't you?

Well, you're also trying to get over a wall right
now, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yamanin Zephyr is a sprinter and miler specialist
trying to tackle medium-distance races. It's a
different obstacle to the one before Nishino
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Nishino Flower's effort to get used to her new
self and elevate her running is plain to see.
choice_data_list:
If you can show her how you overcome your
hurdle...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Maybe it'll give her some courage!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay! I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my absolute very bestest at the
Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't want Zephyr to get crushed by the
pressure of trying to run her best for someone
else. After all...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trying your best for someone else's sake is such a
wonderful, happy thing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm definitely winning the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time Nishino Flower has promised
certain victory in a race. I hope her feelings reach
Yamanin Zephyr!
